message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with dependency upgrades and add upgrade log

Regenerated lockfile reflecting dependency updates: asupersync 0.2.0 ->
0.2.5 (migrated from bincode to bincode-next), bumpalo 3.19.1 -> 3.20.2,
clap 4.5.58 -> 4.5.60, and various new transitive dependencies
(addr2line, backtrace, bit-set, bit-vec, bincode-next, gimli, object,
etc.).

Added UPGRADE_LOG.md documenting the upgrade session and noting that
serde_yaml 0.9.34 is officially deprecated by its maintainer and needs
attention for a future migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
